description: Letter from Bū l-Khayr to the teacher Sulaymān b. Yehuda, in Minyat Zifta. In Judaeo-Arabic. He has sent the raḥamim with Mūsā Ibn Sabra and apologizes for the delay, it is just that he rarely can find someone who is traveling to Minyat Zifta. He reports that the old woman who was in the house of Bū Isḥāq died and that she was buried on Wednesday the 15th of Av.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית ל-Minyat Ziftā. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
